tools.name: d360_query_sql
tools.description: Execute SQL query. Preferred over V1/V2. Supports parameterized queries.

tools.name: d360_query_sql_rows
tools.description: Fetch paginated rows from completed query.

tools.name: d360_metadata
tools.description: Get metadata for entity. ALWAYS use entityName filter.

tools.name: d360_metadata_search
tools.description: Search metadata using natural language. Preferred for discovery.

tools.name: d360_metadata_entities
tools.description: List paginated metadata entities. entityType required.

tools.name: d360_profile_query
tools.description: Query Individual, Account, or custom profile models.

tools.name: d360_insights_query
tools.description: Query calculated insights with dimensions and measures.

tools.name: d360_insights_metadata
tools.description: Discover CI names and available dimensions/measures.

tools.name: d360_datagraph_query
tools.description: Query data graphs. Set live=true for real-time.

tools.name: d360_datagraph_metadata
tools.description: List data graph entities or get schema.

tools.name: d360_dmo_list
tools.description: List all Data Model Objects. Filter by category.

tools.name: d360_dmo_get
tools.description: Get full DMO schema including all fields.

tools.name: d360_dmo_create
tools.description: Create DMO. API name must end with __dlm.

tools.name: d360_dmo_delete
tools.description: Delete DMO. Cascades to dependent objects.

tools.name: d360_dmo_mapping_list
tools.description: List mappings by DMO name or CRM source.

tools.name: d360_dmo_field_mapping_add
tools.description: Add field mappings to an existing object mapping.

tools.name: d360_datastream_list
tools.description: List data streams. Filter by category.

tools.name: d360_datastream_create
tools.description: Create data stream. Requires Connection and DMO Mapping.

tools.name: d360_datastream_update
tools.description: Update stream. Changes apply to future runs.

tools.name: d360_datastream_delete
tools.description: Delete stream. Does not delete existing data.

tools.name: d360_datastream_create_sfdc
tools.description: Create Salesforce CRM data stream. Auto-populates source fields.

tools.name: d360_datastream_create_snowflake
tools.description: Create Snowflake-backed data stream. Builds sourceFields, mappings, and advancedAttributes (database/schema/object) from field definitions.

tools.name: d360_datastream_create_third_party_connectors
tools.description: Create data stream for third-party connectors (Airtable, HubSpot, Marketo, Google Ads, etc). Builds full payload from simple field definitions.

tools.name: d360_connection_create
tools.description: Create connection. connectorType REQUIRED. Test first.

tools.name: d360_connection_update
tools.description: Update connection. Can break dependent streams.

tools.name: d360_connection_test
tools.description: Validate connection before saving. Does NOT create.

tools.name: d360_connector_metadata
tools.description: Get required/optional fields for connector type.

tools.name: d360_snowflake_connection_list
tools.description: List Data 360 connections for a connector type. Use connectorType=SNOWFLAKE for Snowflake.

tools.name: d360_connection_create_snowflake
tools.description: Create a Snowflake connection with KeyPair auth. Provide private key content directly.

tools.name: d360_connection_db_schemas_list
tools.description: List database schemas available in a connection (e.g., Snowflake schemas). Pass database name in advancedAttributes.

tools.name: d360_connection_objects_list
tools.description: List objects/tables available in a connection. Use database/schema in advancedAttributes for DB connections.

tools.name: d360_connection_object_fields_describe
tools.description: Describe field-level schema (names, types, primary keys) of an object in a connection.

tools.name: d360_segment_get
tools.description: Get segment by record ID or API name. Check segmentStatus for ACTIVE.

tools.name: d360_segment_create
tools.description: Create segment. Requires ACTIVE CIs first.

tools.name: d360_segment_update
tools.description: Update segment metadata by API name. Cannot change SQL via PATCH.

tools.name: d360_segment_delete
tools.description: Delete segment by API name (developer name). Irreversible.

tools.name: d360_segment_deactivate
tools.description: Deactivate a segment by API name (developer name). Inverse of publish.

tools.name: d360_ci_list
tools.description: List all CIs. Check status for ACTIVE.

tools.name: d360_ci_create
tools.description: Create CI. apiName must end with __cio. No COUNT(DISTINCT).

tools.name: d360_ir_create
tools.description: Create ruleset. Rules execute in priority order.

tools.name: d360_ir_update
tools.description: Update ruleset. Changes apply after republish.

tools.name: d360_activation_create
tools.description: Create activation. Requires active segment + target.

tools.name: d360_activation_target_create
tools.description: Create target. Must reference existing Connection.

tools.name: d360_dataspace_member_remove
tools.description: Remove members from a data space (max 10).

tools.name: d360_transform_prepare
tools.description: Validate + enrich with output schema. RECOMMENDED before create.

tools.name: d360_transform_validate
tools.description: Quick SQL validation (simple). Use prepare for full validation.

tools.name: d360_datakit_components
tools.description: List org components available for inclusion in data kits.

tools.name: d360_dataaction_create
tools.description: Create action. Must have target configured.

tools.name: d360_sdm_create
tools.description: Create empty model. Add objects separately. dataspace REQUIRED.

tools.name: d360_sdm_data_object_create
tools.description: Add data object. Type: Dmo, Dlo, or Cio.

tools.name: d360_sdm_calc_measure_create
tools.description: Create calculated measurement. aggregationType UserAgg required.

tools.name: d360_sdm_metric_create
tools.description: Create named metric for BI tools.

tools.name: d360_sdm_relationship_create
tools.description: Create relationship. Use semantic field names, not DMO names.

tools.name: d360_sdm_formula_metadata
tools.description: Reference available functions for calc dims/measures.

tools.name: d360_sdm_query
tools.description: Query semantic model. Use semanticModelId not apiName.

tools.name: d360_preview_field_matches
tools.description: Dry-run field matching with confidence scores.

tools.name: d360_smart_datastream_create
tools.description: Auto-select immutable event date for Engagement streams.

tools.name: d360_event_date_recommend
tools.description: Show mutable vs immutable date field scores.

tools.name: d360_standard_mapping_preview
tools.description: Preview standard DLO-to-DMO mappings from 500+ definitions.

tools.name: d360_standard_mapping_create
tools.description: Create ALL standard mappings for a source object in one call.

tools.name: d360_p13n_engagement_signals_list
tools.description: List engagement signals for a data graph. Required for recommender attribution setup.

tools.name: d360_p13n_org_info_get
tools.description: Get org info (Data Cloud TSE endpoint).

tools.name: d360_p13n_experience_config_list
tools.description: List experience configs for a data connector.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_list
tools.description: List prediction job definitions. Optional modelId filter.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_get
tools.description: Get a prediction job definition by id or developer name.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_create
tools.description: Generic create — prefer the type-specific tools (regression, binary, multiclass, sentiment, topic, clustering) which pre-shape the payload and validate locally.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_create_regression
tools.description: Create a Regression prediction job definition. Pre-shapes payload, validates settings ranges (maxTopContributors 0-3, maxPrescriptions 0-3, prescriptionThreshold 0-100).

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_create_binary_classification
tools.description: Create a BinaryClassification prediction job definition. showClassProbabilities defaults to true.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_create_multiclass_classification
tools.description: Create a MulticlassClassification prediction job definition. numberOfClasses ≥ 1, default = all classes.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_create_sentiment_detection
tools.description: Create a SentimentDetection prediction job definition. Defaults model to sfdc_ai__DefaultSalesforceSentimentAnalysis.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_create_topic_classification
tools.description: Create a TopicClassification prediction job definition. 2-5 distinct topic labels, each ≤ 100 chars; up to 3 text fields. Defaults model to sfdc_ai__DefaultSalesforceTopicClassification.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_create_clustering
tools.description: Create a Clustering prediction job definition. clusterIdFieldLabel and clusterLabelFieldLabel are required.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_update
tools.description: Update a prediction job definition. Partial-update; for activation toggle prefer the activate/deactivate tools.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_activate
tools.description: Activate a prediction job definition (sets activationStatus=Active). Required before running.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_deactivate
tools.description: Deactivate a prediction job definition (sets activationStatus=Inactive). Inactive defs cannot be run.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_def_delete
tools.description: Delete a prediction job definition. Irreversible.

tools.name: d360_prediction_job_run
tools.description: Submit a prediction job for execution. Async — response carries job id and initial status. PREREQUISITE: definition must be Active.

tools.name: d360_ml_predict
tools.description: Run synchronous prediction against a configured model — submits raw feature rows and returns per-row Success/Error results with factors, prescriptions, and warnings.

tools.name: d360_ml_setup_version_inspector_metrics_get
tools.description: Training-time inspector metrics for a setup version (AUC, RMSE, confusion matrices, gain table, outcome distribution). gauges defaults to 'Overview'; use 'All' for the full payload.

tools.name: d360_ml_alerts_query
tools.description: Query training-time and runtime data alerts for a model artifact. Returns alerts with structured directives[] for auto-remediation on retrain.

tools.name: d360_ml_alert_update
tools.description: Triage an alert: accept (directives auto-apply on next setup-version) or dismiss.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_artifact_list
tools.description: List trained model artifacts. Filter by modelType, sourceType, dataCloudOneVisibility.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_artifact_get
tools.description: Get a trained model artifact. Carries the parameters, inputFields, outputFields, source/setupContainer back-links.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_artifact_update
tools.description: Update a model artifact (label, description, status, output-field overrides). Status writable values are Enabled/Disabled only.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_artifact_delete
tools.description: Delete a model artifact. Predictive deletes do not cascade — referencing configured models become orphaned.

tools.name: d360_ml_configured_model_list
tools.description: List configured models. Filter by assetIdOrName + assetType (ModelArtifact|ModelSetup) to find configured models bound to a specific artifact or setup.

tools.name: d360_ml_configured_model_get
tools.description: Get a configured model by id or developer name.

tools.name: d360_ml_configured_model_create
tools.description: Create a configured model wrapping a model artifact. artifact reference is required. Status defaults to Disabled unless explicitly Enabled.

tools.name: d360_ml_configured_model_activate
tools.description: Activate a configured model (status=Enabled). Required before the model can be deployed.

tools.name: d360_ml_configured_model_history_list
tools.description: List history snapshots for a configured model.

tools.name: d360_ml_query_setup_fields
tools.description: Enumerate fields and applicable transformations for a data source. First call when authoring a model setup.

tools.name: d360_ml_query_data_profile
tools.description: Profile values on a data source — cardinality, null counts, distribution stats. Use to decide which fields are usable as features.

tools.name: d360_ml_query_outcome
tools.description: List candidate outcome columns (Binary, Discrete, Continuous, Clustering) the data source can support. Optional predictionType narrows results.

tools.name: d360_ml_query_row_count
tools.description: Row count for the data source after filters and joins are applied. Used to gate whether there is enough data to train.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_setup_list
tools.description: List model-setup containers. Filters: search, modelType, modelCapability, setupType, connectorType. Pagination via limit/offset.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_setup_get
tools.description: Get a model-setup container by id or developer name.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_setup_create
tools.description: Create a model-setup container (parent record). Does not start training; follow up with d360_ml_setup_version_create.

tools.name: d360_ml_model_setup_update
tools.description: Update a model-setup container (label, description, modelCapability, outcomeDefinition).

tools.name: d360_ml_model_setup_delete
tools.description: Delete a model-setup container. Cascades to all versions. Irreversible.

tools.name: d360_ml_setup_version_list
tools.description: List versions of a model-setup container.

tools.name: d360_ml_setup_version_get
tools.description: Get one setup version with its full setup body. Use to poll status during training.

tools.name: d360_ml_setup_version_create
tools.description: Create a new EdcNoCode setup version — kicks off training. Algorithm defaulted by outcome type if omitted.

tools.name: d360_ml_setup_version_update
tools.description: Update setup version description or status (only mutable fields). Send status='Training' to start training on a Draft version.
